mapper.select: SELECT id, enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, sid, biz_code AS bizCode, algorithm_template_id AS algorithmTemplateId, business_type AS businessType, business_id AS businessId, unique_mark AS uniqueMark, create_time AS createTime, last_modify_time AS lastModifyTime FROM algorithm_score_config WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND sid = #{sid} AND LOWER(business_type) = #{businessType} ORDER BY id ASC
